programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 17
programs.desc: Each episode features Mike Brewer and former Formula 1 mechanic Marc 'Elvis' Priestley.They are struggling with the renovation of a damaged vehicle.Their goal is to sell a used car at a profit.

programs.title: Steel Buddies
programs.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programs.title: Extreme Loggers
programs.desc: An interesting series of meetings with people performing one of the most dangerous professions in the world - lumberjacks.To pursue this profession, you must demonstrate certain character traits.You have to be tough, strong and determined.According to statistics from the USA, there are 21 times more cases of death at work in this profession than in other occupations.In the program, we get to know both family businesses that have been cutting down trees for years, as well as huge corporations.We watch as masters of this profession face difficult challenges in the most hostile places on earth.
